# CreativeIQ Marketing

> AI-powered digital marketing agency based in San Antonio, Texas. Specializing in SEO, web design, CRM automation, and social media management for growing businesses.

## Services
- SEO: technical SEO, on-page optimization, local SEO, AI SEO audits
- Web Design & Development: conversion-focused websites, landing pages, performance optimization
- CRM Automation: GoHighLevel setup, workflow automation, lead nurturing sequences
- Social Media Management: content strategy, paid and organic social
- Email Marketing: campaign management, automation, list growth

## About
CreativeIQ is a San Antonio digital marketing agency built around AI-first strategies. The agency serves small to mid-sized businesses looking to grow their online presence through search, automation, and conversion-optimized web experiences. Known for transparent reporting, technical depth, and measurable results.
